filters.notes: Primary filter; zone map eliminates ~98.1% of 600 blocks. Qualifying blocks are contiguous — use binary search on zone min/max to find [block_lo, block_hi) window.
int8_t comparison, no decode. Applied per-row inside qualifying blocks.
int8_t comparison, no decode. Applied per-row inside qualifying blocks.

layout.entries: ZoneEntry[num_blocks] where ZoneEntry = { int32_t min_date; int32_t max_date; } (8B each)

indexes.usage: Load entire zone map at startup (fits in L1 cache). Binary search on zone entry min_date/max_date to find contiguous window of qualifying blocks [block_lo, block_hi). Skip any block where zone.max_date < 8766 OR zone.min_date >= 9131.

aggregation.notes: Each thread accumulates into a local double. No hash table needed. Final result = sum of all thread-local accumulators.

parallelism.notes: Divide the row range [block_lo*block_size, block_hi*block_size) evenly across 64 threads. Each thread applies zone-entry check per block it touches, then per-row triple filter, then accumulates revenue. No synchronization during scan — only a single reduction barrier at end.

inner_loop.notes: Apply cheapest/most selective checks first. l_shipdate is int32 with highest selectivity (1.9%); discount and quantity are int8 (no decode). extendedprice (double) read only when all three filters pass.
